queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit risk reduction.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical relationship between negative checking account balances and decreased credit default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Analysis of short-term employment duration as a driver of increased credit default probability.
